title: Update footer copyright text to Smart Watt Nexus and remove McAffine Ink

requirements.summary: Update footer copyright text to display '© Smart Watt Nexus' and remove all references to 'McAffine Ink' or other third-party branding
acceptanceCriteria: The footer copyright text reads '© Smart Watt Nexus' (or '© [year] Smart Watt Nexus') with no mention of 'McAffine Ink' or any other third-party name.
The footer appears consistently across all authenticated pages that use the Layout component.
No other footer content or layout is altered.

file_operations.description: Update the footer section within the Layout component to replace the copyright text with '© Smart Watt Nexus' or '© [current year] Smart Watt Nexus'. Remove any existing references to 'McAffine Ink' or similar third-party branding. Preserve all other footer styling, layout, and content.
